titleStmt.title: SII 15.129: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 129. (B.K. No. 11 of 1930-31.) IṄGAḶĒŚWAR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the north wall of the maṇḍapa in the Sōmanātha temple.

This is dated Śaka 1099, Durmukhi, Pushya śu. 10, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1176 A.D., December 13. The weekday was, however, Monday and the said Saṅkramaṇa occurred on December 15.

It records the royal gift of the village Yasagabāḷu in Sōgilu Twelve in Tarddavāḍi Thousand, to the god Sōmanātha of Iṅgaḷēśvara at the request of Sōvidēva-daṇḍa. nāyaka, son of Ammaṇayya-daṇḍanāyaka. It also registers the gift, to the same god, by purchase, of the village Koḍaganūr in Hebbāḷu Twelve, by Hergaḍe Hīḷa Sōvarasa of Vāji-kula, who is said to have had the temple constructed at Iṅgaḷēśvara whose Five Hundred Mahājanas are praised for their vitues. It is said to have been an agrahāra created by the epic king Janamējaya and styled the Kāśī of Karṇāṭa. Several other gifts by different donors are also enumerated. The gifts were entrusted into the hands of Jñānarāśi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple of Svayambhu-Kēdā rēśvara of Vijayāpura and belonged to the order of Simha-parise. The record was composed by Hōriya Nīlayya of Kāśyapa-gōtra and engraved on stone by Rēvōjason of Hoḍala Rāmōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmūlasthāna dēvara divyaśrī pādapadmārādhakaṁ śrī sāradādēvīlabdha varaprasādaṁ śrīmat kāsyapagōtrapavitraṁ hōriya nīlayyaṁ bareda sāsana © śrī malli kā¨rjjuna dēvaraputra śrī sarasvatīdēvi varaprasādaṁ hoḍala rāmōjana magaṁ rēvōjaṁ hoyda sāsana ©
© namastuṁgaśirascuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . Ōṁ namaḥ sivāya ©
satprakāśa mahatvēna nirasta jagatāṁ tamaḥ tatparaṁ brahmasaṁnnū¨rtti bhāti bhānustrayī mayaḥ © śrīkāṁntaṁ kā¨rttavī¨ryyā¨rjjuna kaḷacuri
rājēṁdranuddāmada¨rppō¨rvvīkāṁntāmaṁṇḍanudyatkarikuḷaviḷayōtkaṁṭha kaṁṭhīravaṁ gaurīkāṁntāmnāya śuṁbhaḍḍamarukaguruni¨rgghōśaṇaṁ
prājyarājya śrīkāṁntākuntaḷakṣmāpati nijabhuja cakrēsvaraṁ bijjabhūpaṁ © ghanada ¨rppōgradviṣadhvāṁtamanuḍigisi kāḷiṁgavaṁ gāṁganakṣa
tranikāyōdyōtamaṁ sūcisi paḍedu jagaccakrasaṁprītiyaṁ mitranripā¨rjja śrīvikāsaṁ salalesadudu kalyāṇa māṁgalya
siṁhāsana pū¨rvvādrīṁdra nityābhyudaya subhaṭarāditya tējaprabhāvaṁ © kaḷacurirājya dabhyudaya lakṣmiya bijjala cakrava¨rttigaggaḷave
ne taṁdegiṁdagi migilu diṭaveṁba janōkti vistaraṁ baḷedire vairirāyagajakēsari rāyamurārivīrakuṁtaḷapati sōṁvidēvane
sadaṁ ripurāyakuḷābja kuṁjaraṁ © śrīyaṁ bhūribhujāsiyiṁ paḍedu vīrārāti sēnābdhi yoḷu jīyeṁdaṁga kaḷiṁga vaṁga nriparittuṁ tettu vātmāṁghripadmāya
tvaṁ nijabhrityarāge taḷedaṁ bhūcakrarājyō¨rjjita śrīyaṁ rāyamurāri rāyagajasiṁhaṁ sōmabhūpāḷakaṁ © tatpāda padmōpajīvi © yaṇumā
traṁ kanakācaḷaṁ nijamahaunyatyakke vārāsi vāmkaṇamātraṁ nija sadgabhīratage kaḷpō¨rvvī ruhaṁ niścayaṁ triṇamātraṁ nijadānadēḷgeyanaliṁ sāmānyene pe¨rṁmme
yammaṇadaṁḍādhiparatnanudgha sahavāsyāmnāya satsēkharaṁ © Ene saṁdaṁmmaṇadaṇḍanāthana sutaṁ vikrāṁtadoḷu prā(pā)¨rtthanaṁnnane
tāṁ tējadoḷa¨rkkanaṁnnane lasatsaṁvuda¨ryyadoḷkāmanaṁnnane sadbhōgadoḷiṁdranaṁnnane nitāṁtōdā¨ryyadoḷu ka¨rṇnanaṁnnane daṁḍādhipa sōvidēvanenelinnēṁ
vaṇnipeṁ baṇnipeṁ © śrīmatu sōmakulābhivri¨rddhi vibhavāṁbhōrāsi caṁdrōdayaṁ sōmāmnāyada pāṁḍavā¨rjjuna tanūjō
tpaṁnna putrōttamaṁ sōmābhaṁ janamējayaṁ kaliyugādi kṣatriyēṁdra vaṁśōddhāmaṁ ni¨rmmisidiṁgaḷēsvarapuraṁ ka¨rṇnāṭa kāśīpuraṁ . © paṁcaśatāṁkariṁdra
vibhavābhyudayū¨rjjita sa¨rvvavēdaśāstrōcita sadvivēkanaya ni¨rṁmmaḷadha¨rmma saṁvri¨rddhi lōkarōmāṁcanagaṇyapuṁṇyakrititatpara satpathava¨rtti sa¨rja
naṁ kāṁcanakalpabhūruhame sadguṇabhāsvaraviṁgaḷēsvara © vinayavibhāsi cakradharanaṁnte driḍaṁ driḍabhāva śōbhikāṁcana nagadaṁnte viśruta varaśruti
bhūśaṇa vēdiyaṁnte pāvanaguṇavagniyaṁnte vriśayāna virājita viśanaṁnte jīyene jagaviṁga ḷēsvarada paṁcasatadvijarāji raṁjikuṁ © Ene negaḷdiṁgaḷēsvarada
kāvaṟagēriya viprasaṁkuḷaṁ janadanurāgavallarige pallavamaṁ parevoḷguṇaṁgaḷiṁ vinayaviḷāsa bhāsurateyiṁ puruśā¨rta śama¨rttha
bhavyava¨rttanateyinoppuguṁ guṇagaṇaṁgaḷinā pesa¨rvvetta kēriyiṁ © śrīmadvājikulā �janabhōmaṇi śiṣṭēṣṭavaṁdi briṁdōtsava ciṁntāmaṇi kauvuṁḍilya śirōmaṇi
Ene bācirājananupamatēja © Ene pesa¨rvvetta bācarasaneṁba nega¨rtteya sadguṇābdhi yoḷu jananutareṁbaraṁbudhiyoḷudbhavipaṁntire
hīḷaneṁba peṁpine kaṇi mānavākritiya ratnamenalu nayamēru puṭṭidaṁ manujaviḷāsavāsa vanupā¨rjjise sīḷaguṇāḷikēśavaṁ © śrī satyāṁ
budhikēsirāja vibhuvuddāma pratāpōdayāvāsaṁ puṭṭidana¨rtthisā¨rtthakumudaṁ tāṁ raṁjisalu pe¨rccideṁto nibhāsāṁdraṁ janarāga caṁdrike ripudvāṁtāpahā
rapriyābhyāsaṁ ṟōḍisutuṁ sthiratvaguṇadiṁ �ḷōdramaṁcaṁdramaṁ © janatānaṁdapayōdhi caṁdravibhavaṁ pe¨rṁmmāḍirāya priyāṁgana tāṁ malhaṇidēvigū¨rjji
ta niyōgōdyōgadiṁ rājyava¨rddhanamaṁ māḍida maṁtri maṁtritiḷakaṁ vidva¨rnnikāyā marāvanijaṁ he¨rggaḍe hīḷacaṁḍanesedaṁ kauṁvuṁḍilya gōtrōdbhavaṁ © vina
ya vudāra voḷpu patibhakti caritravādā¨rttavāda peṁpinakaṇi mānavākritiya pā¨rvvatirūpa viḷāsalakṣmiyeṁbī navabhimānameṁdī
jasaṁ baḍedaḷuṁnnata kī¨rttimati caṁdanasati puṇyaputravati jākaladēvi mahītaḷāgra doḷu © śīḷaguṇaṁgaḷoḷu nereda jākaladēvige taṁnna kī¨rtti dikpāḷaraneyde
va¨rccisuva rūḍhiya he¨rggaḍe caṁdramaṁga suṁṇḍāḷariha pratāpanidhi puṭṭidanunnatadha¨rṁmma ni¨rṁmmaḷaṁ hīḷanenalu guṇaṁ negaḷda sōvarasaṁ puruśā¨rtthabhū
śaṇaṁ © dhara pūgaḷviṁgaḷēsvaradoḷoppuva paṁcasata dvijēṁdrarādarisuva pe¨rṁmmedha¨rṁmmada tava¨rmmaneyāgire ni¨rmmaḷatvamaṁ dhariyisidaṁ viśā
ḷanayakēḷiya hīḷavesa¨rddharitrigābharaṇavenalu jasaṁ baḍeda sōvaṇanoḷguṇaratnakēvaṇaṁ © vasudhege taṁnna kī¨rtti posamuttina beḷvoḍeyāgi
re dhātri kī¨rttise negaḷdiṁgaḷēsvarada madhyadoḷoppire taṁnna nāmadiṁdeseye nijānvayō dbhava samri(¨r)ddhige kāraṇamāge sadguṇaṁ pasarise hī
ḷa sōmaneḷe jīyene māḍisidaṁ trikūṭamaṁ © yidu vēdatraya tatvasāramidedalu śakti trayākāraviṁntidu mūṟuṁTheda is written above the line.
jagamoldupā¨rjjisida puṇyaṁ hīḷasōmāṁmnayābhyudayaṁ tānenaliṁgalēsvarada madyasthānadoḷcelvanāḷdudu sōmēsvarasau¨ryya sō
ciraṁ ś®(śrī)matrikūṭāspadaṁ © sōmana puṁṇyamū¨rtti vinayāṁbudhi sōmana sajjana priyaṁ sōmana dha¨rmma kaṁ
sōmane sōmane baṁdhuvatsaḷaṁ sōmane vaiṣṇavaṁ sumati sōmana sōmana sadguṇā śrayaṁ sōmane dēvaneṁdu dhare baṁṇnisutippudu hīḷasō
dharapogaḷeḷemēlānvaya parirājita siṁhapaṇaśumaṁḍaḷi . maleyūḷaraśiśya pratiśiśya¨rnnira vadyaṁ dha¨rmmarāsi munipōttaṁsaṁ © tanmunipa
na¨rtthi marunmahījaṁ vibudhajananidhānaṁ vāṇijanmanivāsaṁ viśrutasaṁnmā¨rggaṁ jñāna rāsi munipōttaṁsaṁ © dānavinōdaṁ vibudhanidhāna
vijayapurada kēdāra mahāsthānācā¨ryya kī¨rttiś®(śrī)nārīpati kumāradēvabratipaṁ © bādinoḷēṁ vimaḷayaśaḥśrīdaitya¨rjñānarā si
taraṇadiṁ mēdinige vijayanagariya kēdāraṁ kalpabhūjavādudu citraṁ © svasti śrīma tkaḷacu¨ryya bhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti rāya
murāri sōmēsvaradēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamira sakava¨rṣada 1099 neya du¨rmmukhi saṁvatsa
rada pusya suddha 10 mi brihaspativāradaṁdu vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa pa¨rvva nimittavāgi śrīmanmahāpradhāna sēnādhipa
yammaṇayya daṁṇḍanāyakara kumāraṁ sōvidēva daṁṇḍanāyakara biṁnnapadiṁ ta¨rddavāḍi sāsiradoḷagaṇa sōgilu hane raḍaṟa baḻiya
bāḍaṁ yasagabāḷanu murāri sōvidēvarāyaṁ sāsanada mane yiṁgaḷēsvarada ś®(śrī) sōmanātha dēvaraṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgakkaṁ kha(ṁ)ṇḍasphuṭika(ta) jī¨rṇnō
ddhārakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ sa¨rvvanamasyavāgi dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru © hebbāḷu hanneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ koḍaganūra
yaṣṭabhōga tējanāmyavaṁ yū hīḷa sōvarasaṁgaḷu krayamaṁ koṁḍu tamma dēva¨rgge biṭṭaru © śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati
dēri daṁṇḍanāyakaru hebbāḷa prabhumukhyavāgi niḍuguṁdeya dāriyiṁ paḍuvalu sīmeyiṁ baḍagalu māligageyiṁ mūḍalu
keṟeyiṁ teṁkalu hebbāḷa gaḍiṁbadalu sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 100 yū hīḷasōvara saṁgaḷu yiṁgaḷēsvarada mahājanaṁgaḷanumatadi
mī muddeyageyyeruvaṇaṁ bharaṇadakōla parisaṁkina mattaru baḷḷavolada mogeyoḷage jāmagavuḍabiṭṭa bharaṇada kōla parisaṁkina mattaru
kāriṟagēriya teṁkaṇāḷigeya basadiyiṁ paḍuva caṁdaṇagēriyekkasaṁdiyiṁ baḍaga dāriyiṁ mūḍaṇa maneya nivēśaṇamaṁ bādubeya dēguladiṁ
yaṁgaḍi mūṟu yoladakaṭṭiṁ mūḍaṇa nivēśaṇa sahitaṁ gāṇavoṁdu mūḍaṇa bēḷada hebbāgila bīdiyiṁ paḍuvalu baṇabe nivēśaṇavoṁdu nāḍugaḷu biṭṭāyaṁ hoṟagiṁbaṁ da
mūle mattaṁ mānavoṁdu māṟida hoṁge meḷasu mūnavoṁdu yaḍake hattu bellahattu yarisinaṁ palavaydu yellaṁ palavaydu sakkare palavaydu sāsi¨rvvaru biṭṭāya
hēriṁge yele yayvattu hottaḷakke yele yippattuvaṁdu yadhikārigaḷu biṭṭāyaṁ yā sthaḷada Eleya hēṟina daṁḍigeya suṁka hēḻiṁge The letter du is written above the line.
mēlele yinnūṟu telligara kottaḷigaḷu gāṇakke haḷigevoṁdu biṭṭaru nakharaṁgaḷu dēvara vīḷeyakke va[¨r]ṣaṁprati yaṁgaḍiyalu pratyēka
daṁ biṭṭaru sāligadereyoḷage dēvaraḍḍāḷegeṁdu yaresugaḷu biṭṭa vokkalu voṁdu sēṇi gara kottaḷigaḷu dēvara pavitrārōpaṇada nūlige va¨rṣaṁprati
lli hāgavoṁdaṁ biṭṭaru hīḷakēvarasa mallarasa sōvarase mūgarasaṁgaḷu taṁmma yaṁgaragēriya seṭṭidaṟeyiṁ va¨rṣaṁpratiyiṁ baha gadyāṇaveraḍumaṁ dēva¨rgge biṭṭaru ©
yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyūma pratyāhāra dhyānadhāraṇasamādhirūpāṣṭāṁgayōga saṁpaṁnnaruṁ nayavinaya mahimōpapannaruṁ guravācara
śrigaruṁ ni¨rjjitānaṁgaru śrī siṁha¨rsparu¨rśadamaḷakamaḷinīvikasanasahasrakiraṇaruṁ gurukuḷōddharaṇādināmāvaḷi virājamānarappa śrī
dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi vijayāpurada śrīsvayaṁbhu kēdārēsvaradēvarā cā¨ryya jñānarāsipaṁḍitadēvarakālaṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi yā hīḷa sōvarasa na
dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rggegaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷu sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsira honnumaṁ sāsira vēdapāragarappa
phala © Ī dha¨rmmamanaḷidava¨rgge gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷu sāsira kavileymaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarumanaḷida dōśa © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
[¨rvva]¨rśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi © sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rṁmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālēkālē pālanīyō bhavadbhi sa¨rvvānētāṁbhāginaḥ prā¨rtthi
yācatē rāmacaṁdra © bahubhi¨rvvasudhādattā rājabhiḥssagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasyatasya tadā phalaṁ © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
